Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Return of the Obra Dinn: spherical mapped dithering for a 1bpp first-person game 292 upvotes, 40 comments
  2. Noq: n0's new QUIC implementation in Rust 179 upvotes, 24 comments
  3. Linux Page Faults, MMAP, and userfaultfd for faster VM boots 18 upvotes, 0 comments
  4. ArXiv Declares Independence from Cornell 64 upvotes, 9 comments
  5. Full Disclosure: A Third (and Fourth) Azure Sign-In Log Bypass Found 86 upvotes, 15 comments
  6. NanoGPT Slowrun: 10x Data Efficiency with Infinite Compute 122 upvotes, 25 comments
  7. From Oscilloscope to Wireshark: A UDP Story (2022) 100 upvotes, 20 comments
  8. OpenBSD: PF queues break the 4 Gbps barrier 188 upvotes, 60 comments
  9. Physicists Trace Sun's Magnetic Engine, 200k Kilometers Below Surface 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  10. Show HN: Three new Kitten TTS models – smallest less than 25MB 370 upvotes, 146 comments
  11. Be intentional about how AI changes your codebase 97 upvotes, 36 comments
  12. Launch HN: Voltair (YC W26) – Drone and charging network for power utilities 67 upvotes, 24 comments
  13. Drugwars for the TI-82/83/83 Calculators (2011) 102 upvotes, 42 comments
  14. Scaling Karpathy's Autoresearch: What Happens When the Agent Gets a GPU Cluster 145 upvotes, 67 comments
  15. Launch HN: Canary (YC W26) – AI QA that understands your code 47 upvotes, 17 comments
  16. A Journey Through Infertility 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  17. Push events into a running session with channels 279 upvotes, 149 comments
  18. How the Turner twins are mythbusting modern technical apparel 177 upvotes, 91 comments
  19. Astral to Join OpenAI 1299 upvotes, 801 comments
  20. Cockpit is a web-based graphical interface for servers 217 upvotes, 128 comments
  21. Last love: a romance in a care home (2023) 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  22. EsoLang-Bench: Evaluating Genuine Reasoning in LLMs via Esoteric Languages 84 upvotes, 46 comments
  23. Clockwise acquired by Salesforce 101 upvotes, 58 comments
  24. An update on Steam / GOG changes for OpenTTD 296 upvotes, 203 comments
  25. Bombarding gamblers with offers greatly increases betting and gambling harm 113 upvotes, 90 comments
  26. Waymo Safety Impact 274 upvotes, 275 comments
  27. How many branches can your CPU predict? 52 upvotes, 42 comments
  28. Google details new 24-hour process to sideload unverified Android apps 651 upvotes, 723 comments
  29. Wayland set the Linux Desktop back by 10 years? 228 upvotes, 242 comments
  30. 4Chan mocks £520k fine for UK online safety breaches 325 upvotes, 532 comments

Last generated 2:00pm, 20 March 2026. Source here.
